facilities.name: Amarillo Landfill
facilities.hours: Check the City of Amarillo for current landfill hours before visiting.
facilities.fees: Landfill fees vary by load type, weight, and waste class. Confirm current rates before arrival.
facilities.rules: Use the official city page to confirm accepted loads, appliance preparation rules, and payment requirements before driving.

facilities.name: West Brush Site
facilities.hours: Check the City of Amarillo for current brush site hours before visiting.
facilities.fees: Brush site service is generally free for residents. Confirm current ID or utility-bill requirements before arrival.
facilities.rules: Use the official city page to confirm resident requirements and accepted yard-waste materials before driving.

facilities.name: East Brush Site
facilities.hours: Check the City of Amarillo for current brush site hours before visiting.
facilities.fees: Brush site service is generally free for residents. Confirm current ID or utility-bill requirements before arrival.
facilities.rules: Use the official city page to confirm resident requirements and accepted yard-waste materials before driving.

facilities.name: East Hastings Recycling Drop-Off
facilities.hours: Check the City of Amarillo for current recycling drop-off guidance before visiting.
facilities.fees: Most city recycling drop-off services are free for residents. Confirm current rules before arrival.
facilities.rules: Use the official city page to confirm accepted materials, site instructions, and any resident requirements before driving.
